prestazioni: MR20DD (2.0L Direct Injection NA) engine: HKS Hi-Power Super SQV4 blow-off valve (MR20-specific flange) paired with a Tomei 4-2-1 stainless header (MR20DD-specific runner lengths) to optimize scavenging for the 112 kW (150 hp) stock output, targeting a 20% torque increase at 4,500 RPM

Tein Flex Z coilovers (Nissan C-platform specific valving) with 24-way adjustable dampening, custom spring rates (6kg/mm front, 5kg/mm rear) to correct the 55:45 weight bias, and reinforced top mounts (Cusco pillowball) to handle the 1,450 kg curb weight

Nismo S-Tune 22mm front sway bar (Lafesta-specific bushing mounts) and Cusco 19mm rear sway bar (bolt-on, no welding required) to eliminate the 0.98g understeer limit, paired with Endless CC-RS brake pads (MR20DD-specific compound) and DBA 5000 Series rotors (280mm front, 260mm rear) for fade-free stopping from 100-0 km/h in under 38 meters
estetica: Veilside Fortune 03 widebody conversion (Lafesta-specific fender flares, bolt-on over OEM panels) with custom carbon fiber side skirts (Seibon, 1.2mm pre-preg) to cover the 225/40R18 Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R tires (ET35 offset) on Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (18x8.5 front, 18x9.5 rear)

Tommy Kaira M20 aero kit (Lafesta Highway STAR-specific front bumper lip, side diffusers, and rear wing) with custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap (Xpel PPF on high-impact zones) and LED DRLs (Philips Ultinon Pro9000, 6,000K) integrated into the OEM fog light housings

Recaro Sportster CS (Lafesta-specific mounting brackets) with custom Alcantara/leather upholstery (Saddle Brown with red stitching) and a Nismo 350mm flat-bottom steering wheel (MR20DD-specific airbag delete) wrapped in Alcantara (Sparco 380mm grip)
